name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) software and what does it actually do?
description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) software helps you monitor and improve how your brand appears in AI-generated answers, voice assistants, and featured snippets.

mainEntity.name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) software and what does it actually do?

acceptedAnswer.text:
Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) software helps you track and improve how your brand, content, and products show up in AI-generated answers, voice assistants, and featured snippets. It typically combines monitoring, structured data guidance, and content recommendations so answer engines can confidently cite your site.

AEO software sits on top of your existing site and analytics stack, focusing specifically on question-based queries, snippets, and AI responses instead of just classic SEO rankings. It’s most useful for businesses that rely on organic discovery and want visibility in tools like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity.

Key factors:
- What engines it monitors (Google, Bing, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, voice assistants)
- How it handles schema, FAQs, and structured data
- Integration with Search Console, analytics, and CMS
- Reporting on brand mentions, snippets, and AI citations

Start by listing the questions your audience asks, then use AEO software to see where you already appear and where you don’t, and prioritize content fixes for high-intent queries. Treat it as a discovery and optimization layer, not a replacement for SEO. 

If you’re evaluating tools, look for ones that support both classic SEO metrics and AI answer visibility in a single view.
acceptedAnswer.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) software helps you monitor and improve how your brand appears in AI-generated answers, voice assistants, and featured snippets. It focuses on question-based queries, structured data, and content optimization so answer engines like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity are more likely to cite your site.
